post_op_instructions: No heavy lifting for 48 hours after the procedure
Urine culture (ECBU) required 7 days before the procedure
Urea and creatinine blood test required 7 days before the procedure
Mention current lithium treatment to the urologist
documents.follow_up: Control appointment 15 days after the procedure
documents.notes: Patient on long-term lithium therapy, psychiatric follow-up ongoing.

medications.name: Lithium
medications.instructions: Existing treatment, do not stop without psychiatrist approval

clinical_note.observations: Patient on lithium since 2019, psychiatric follow-up ongoing. Lives alone on the 5th floor without an elevator at 25 rue Tolbiac, Paris 13.
